title: Number
description: A value that is a number.
$comment:
This is an implementation of schema.org [`Number`](https://schema.org/Number).

In Stencila Schema it is represented as a primitive node so numeric values can
be typed, validated, and embedded consistently across data, parameters, and
executable document state.

See also [`Integer`](./integer.md) and
[`UnsignedInteger`](./unsigned-integer.md).
